title: Greek Salad with Hearts of Palm and Avocado
ingredients: 1 tablespoon fresh herbs (mix of thyme, basil, oregano, parsley)
2 large heads red leaf lettuce, torn
1 can (14 ounces) hearts of palm, drained and sliced into rounds
instructions: Combine lemon juice, fresh herbs, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, salt, pepper, and garlic in a small bowl.
Whisk in olive oil until combined.
Stir in crumbled feta cheese and set aside.
Toss all lettuce in a salad bowl.
Add olives, hearts of palm, avocados, tomatoes, and cucumber to the lettuce.
Add dressing to the salad, toss gently, and serve.
notes: Cavendar's Greek seasoning is optional but adds authentic Greek flavor to the dressing
The dressing can be made ahead and stored in the refrigerator
